resources.string: Roleplay Affirmations
Today\'s challenge is merely a skill I haven\'t rolled yet.
Every encounter has a second wind. So do I.
I did not come this far to fail a passive perception check.
I roll with advantage on being myself.
I have survived the owlbear. I can survive this group project.
My body is a weapon, my mind is a fortress, and my to-do list is merely a suggestion.
I do not need armor. I AM the armor. Now, I will roll for initiative.
The path to inner peace runs directly through the coffee maker. I have mapped this route. It is reliable.
I do not need caffeine to function. I simply need it to not be a problem for everyone else.
My chi is aligned. My ki is focused. I am in perfect balance.
I am a mere conduit between worlds. Who am I to refuse the demands of the spirits for glazed offerings?
The spirit world sees my worth even when I cannot.
I am a bridge between worlds. I can handle this meeting.
My spirit companion never judges me.
I do not argue with the spirits. I have enough going on.
First I RAGE. Then I process my feelings.
Others plan. Others scheme. I simply show up and problems resolve themselves.
I take half damage from negative self-talk. The other half just makes me stronger.
I\'m not loud. I\'m projecting confidence with Intimidate proficiency.
My anger is not a flaw, it\'s a class feature.
Fly like Bug Bunny in Space Jam
